calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause To Determine Whether Mr. Webb Should Be Declared A Vexatious Litigant
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ARTHUR WEBB, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. JOHN M. ANTON OF THE BOXER GERSON LLP, TEL. NO. (510) 835-8870 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Order To Show Cause To Determine Whether Mr. Webb Should Be Declared A Vexatious Litigant, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF PLEADINGS IN THIS CASE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS DECLARED A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT PURSUANT TO BOTH C C P SECTION 391(B)(2) AND SECTION 391 (B)(3) BECAUSE HE HAS REPEATEDLY RELITIGATED THE VALIDITY OF THE COURTS FINAL DETERMINATION IN THIS CASE, AND HE HAS REPEATEDLY FILED UNMERITORIUS MOTIONS. SPECIFICALLY, HE HAS FILED SEVEN MOTIONS SEEKING RECONSIDERATION, REVERSAL OR VACATION OF THE COURT'S ORDER SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER AGAINST HIM. EACH MOTION HAS PRESENTED THE SAME ARGUMENTS, AND EACH HAS BEEN DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS CONTINUED FILING THESE MOTIONS NOTWITHSTANDING THE ENTRY OF FINAL JUDGMENT AGAINST HIM AND NOTWITHSTANDING HIS BEING NOTIFIED IN OPEN COURT THAT CONTINUING TO FILE SUCH MOTIONS WOULD RESULT IN THE COURT INSTITUTING PROCEEDINGS TO DECLARE HIM A VEXATIOUS LITIGANT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
John Anton, Esq. of Boxer Gerson, 510-835-8870 for defendants and moving parties BOXER & GERSON, LLP., STEWART BOXER, MARK DUNNING
Arthur Webb, Plaintiff and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT BOXER & GERSON, LLP., STEWART BOXER, MARK DUNNING'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CONTRACT CLAIM TO ALLEGE WHETHER CONTRACT IS ORAL OR WRITTEN. ATTACH WRITTEN AGREEMENT AND/OR ALLEGE SPECIFICALLY THE TERMS OF THAT AGREEMENT THAT WERE BREACHED AND HOW THEY WERE BREACHED. SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE FRAUD CLAIM TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY AND TO ADDRESS THE 3 YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL OTHER CLAIMS. Defendant's counsel to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Jacqueline Chan, CSR# 10276
(301/PJB/BD)
